result.summary: The page is generally recognizable, but several elements appear horizontally clipped or overlapped on the mobile viewport, suggesting layout overflow and insufficient safe spacing around fixed navigation.

issues.description: Game cards in the rightmost column are cut off by the edge of the screen in multiple sections. Only partial thumbnails and badges are visible, making the grid look broken.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid for mobile to show only the number of columns that fit the viewport, or make the carousel/scroll behavior explicit with proper spacing and snap points.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen. The lower game row is partially hidden behind the nav bar.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content equal to the height of the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right side, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: If this is a horizontal scroll area, add clearer spacing and scroll affordance; otherwise reduce tab widths or wrap/adapt the layout for mobile.

issues.description: Some game badges and overlays are very close to card edges or partially clipped on cropped cards, such as the 'EXCLUSIVE' badges and jackpot amount labels.
issues.suggestion: Ensure card overlays stay within visible safe margins and are not affected by horizontal overflow or image cropping.
